name: Meroé, The desert Guide
description:
Meroé is from the Aaru Village being the twin brother of Candance, while Candance was more into combat, Meroé prefered to study, his mother gave him a telescope and he falled in love with the starts and it's beauty, with time he learned how to guide throught the desert with the stars, so after he heard of Dori's ideia of doing comerce with Aaru village he decided that by a small price he would guide them trought the desert till the village using the starts as a guide.

He is intellegent, responsible, easy-going, brave, funny, humble and can change from calm to angered easliy, he cares deeply about those he likes.

He has been training since his 14 to do what he does today.

He has a bit of combat experience.

He is 22 years old.

Probably one of the most difficult to get image no joke was Chat GTP who done it and that shit just fails to get the OC is to be dark skin (to be fair is to be like Candance just slighty more).

Hope you like and yes I am trying a new format of Bio.
